mapper.select:
select id, student_number, name, gender, class_name, phone, email, avatar, create_time, update_time from student
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and student_number like concat('%', #{studentNumber}, '%')
order by id desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from student
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and student_number like concat('%', #{studentNumber}, '%')
select id, student_number, name, gender, class_name, phone, email, avatar, create_time, update_time from student order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into student(student_number, name, gender, class_name, phone, email, avatar) values(#{studentNumber}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{className}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar})
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
